title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Securities

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Securities
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
